AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.title: Aemeath
AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.description:
Aemeath, once a resonance researcher at the academy.
She controls the flow of battle through Sync Rate and Resonance, building toward explosive turns.
AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.cardsModifierDescripti: Aemeath cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.eventDeathPrevention: I can't fall here... not yet.
AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.aromaPrinciple: [sine]Harmony must not fall to disorder... I must keep moving.[/sine]
AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.unlockText: Play a single run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
